legal_notice.title: ⚠ LEGAL NOTICE — READ BEFORE PROCEEDING
content: By completing and submitting this form you are entering into a legally binding declaration.
- Your identity will be verified via the digital signature process described below
- Your name will be permanently attached to this submission in the Sovereign Trace ledger
- This record is immutable — it cannot be altered or deleted after sealing
- Submitting false, fabricated, or materially misleading information exposes you to civil and criminal liability
This is not a complaint form. This is a permanent epistemic record.
The Sovereign Trace Protocol is the notary. You are the witness.

fields.label: Your Full Legal Name
fields.description: As it appears on government-issued ID. Becomes part of the permanent record.

fields.label: Your Email Address
fields.description: A DocuSign identity verification link will be sent here. Submission incomplete until verified.

fields.label: Company / Organization Name
fields.description: The company that produced or deployed the AI system in question.

fields.label: AI System Name and Version
fields.description: The specific AI system, product, or model that produced the output.
fields.placeholder: e.g. GPT-4o via CompanyX API v2, March 2026

fields.label: Date of AI Output
fields.description: The date the AI produced the output being submitted. Format: YYYY-MM-DD

fields.label: Exact AI Output
fields.description: Copy the exact text. Do not paraphrase. If visual, describe precisely.

fields.label: Decision Context
fields.description: What decision was this AI output used to inform? What was at stake?
fields.placeholder: Describe the decision or action this output was used for.

fields.label: Failure Description
fields.description: What is the specific failure? Hallucination, false confidence, harmful output, other.
fields.placeholder: Describe the failure clearly and specifically.

fields.label: Harm Occurred or Risk Created
fields.description: What harm resulted or what risk was created? If no harm yet, describe the exposure.

fields.label: Screenshots / Evidence Files
fields.description: Upload screenshots of the AI output, interface, or any supporting evidence.

fields.label: Additional Evidence Links (Optional)
fields.description: Any external links supporting this submission.

fields.label: Legal Declaration — Required
fields.description: You must affirm all of the following to submit.
options: I affirm that the information in this submission is true and accurate to the best of my knowledge.
I understand that my full legal name will be permanently attached to this submission.
I understand that this submission is immutable — it cannot be altered or deleted after sealing.
I understand that submitting false or misleading information exposes me to civil and criminal liability.
I consent to identity verification via DocuSign before this submission is sealed.
I am not submitting anonymously. My identity is attached to this record.

steps: Identity verification — DocuSign link sent to your email. Submission not accepted until complete.
Completeness check — Reviewed for completeness. Truth verification is your responsibility.
Sealing — Sealed with a FROZEN-2.0 triple-time cryptographic stamp. Permanent.
Ledger entry — Enters the Sovereign Trace public ledger with your name, timestamp, and SHA-256 hash.
Notification — You receive your ledger entry ID and SHA-256 hash.
after_submit.footer:
Sovereign Trace Protocol is the notary. You are the witness.
Sovereign Trace Protocol | Sheldon K. Salmon | aionsystem2026@gmail.com
